fields.explainZh: 集群模式，分为多机集群模式和双机热备模式。
fields.explainEn: Team operating mode, which can be multi-device mode or stateful failover mode.
Subnet mask of the team IP address.
Team IP address.
IP address of the active leader in the team.
Team name.
Controller IP address.
Role.

fields.explainZh: 该控制器在集群中的状态。
fields.explainEn: Status of the controller in the team.

fields.explainZh: 该控制器上配置的同步状态。
fields.explainEn: Configuration recovery status of the controller.
Controller IP address.
Controller name.
Number of OpenFlow connections established by the controller as the master.

fields.explainZh: 优先级是控制器节点在集群中的选举权重,优先级越高的拥有越大的可能被选为主leader。
fields.explainEn: Priority is the election weight of a controller node in the cluster; the higher the priority, the greater the likelihood of being selected as the leader.
Name of the region to which the controller belongs.
Role of the controller in the region.
Role of the controller in the team.
Management IP of the physical NE.
Name of the physical NE.
Region to which the physical NE belongs.

fields.explainZh: 物理网元状态，POST请求不支持该参数。
fields.explainEn: Status of the physical NE. This parameter is not supported by POST requests.

fields.explainZh: 设备已分配的VXLAN隧道数目，设备类型为UNDERLAY_DEVICE时无效。
fields.explainEn: Number of assigned VXLAN tunnels on the physical NE. This parameter is invalid when the device type is UNDERLAY_DEVICE. This parameter is not supported by POST requests.
Type of the physical NE.
IPv4 address of the VXLAN tunnel endpoint.
ID of the firewall.
Firewall name.
Status of the firewall.
ID of the backward firewall policy.
Name of the backward firewall policy.
ID of the forward firewall policy.
Name of the forward firewall policy.
Name of the tenant to which the firewall belongs.

fields.explainZh: 防火墙策略已审计标志。
fields.explainEn: Indicates whether the firewall policy is audited.
Description of the firewall policy.
Name of the firewall policy.
ID of the firewall policy.
Share mode of the firewall policy.
Tenant ID.
Tenant name of the firewall policy.
Description of the firewall rule.
Destination IP address of the firewall rule.
Destination port number of the firewall rule.
Indicates whether the firewall rule is enabled.
ID of the policy to which the firewall rule belongs.

fields.explainZh: 防火墙规则所属策略名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of the policy to which the firewall rule belongs.
IP version.
Name of the firewall rule.
Protocol of the firewall rule.
Action of the firewall rule.
ID.
Rule sharing mode.
Source IP address of the firewall rule.
Source port number of the firewall rule.
Tenant ID.
Tenant name of the firewall rule.
Time span ID.
Time span name.

fields.explainZh: 会话请求报文目的IP地址。
fields.explainEn: Destination IP address of session request packets.

fields.explainZh: 会话请求报文目的端口。
fields.explainEn: Destination port number of session request packets.

fields.explainZh: 会话请求报文传输层协议。
fields.explainEn: Transport-layer protocol of session request packets.
Source IP address of session request packets.
Source port number of session request packets.

fields.explainZh: 会话表的传输层协议状态。
fields.explainEn: Transport-layer protocol status of the session table.
Total number of network devices in the region.
Region name.
ID of the vPort.
IP address of the vPort.
MAC address of the vPort.
vPort name.
Name of the virtual link layer network.
Status of the vPort.
vPort type.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
